---
name: Security report (DO NOT FILE PUBLICLY)
about: Vulnerability or sensitive issue — see SECURITY.md before filing
title: "[security] "
labels: security
---

**STOP — for security issues, please follow the disclosure process in `SECURITY.md` instead of opening a public issue.**

If you've already coordinated with the maintainer and were asked to file an issue here, redact:
- Bot tokens
- Proof-of-concept exploit payloads
- Personal/organizational identifiers

Then describe:
- What the issue is
- What component is affected (file:line if known)
- Severity assessment
- Coordinated disclosure timeline
